title: LifeSmart Nature Thermostat(24V System) (Gray Frame - Black Glass) LS220- GT2
description:
LifeSmart’s Nature Thermostat(24V System) is a smart thermostat that allow you to remotely control the temperature in your home using your phone with a compatible smart display. It is suitable for household, commercial and industrial scenarios. It controls the temperature at the end of the HVAC system.
Adapter: AC 24V | Packaging: English | HS code: 8471412000
availability: Catalogue price list / availability under review
